items.whyNotDiy: Why not just do it yourself?

hero.title:
Every journey starts

with a feeling.
hero.intro: Fully personalised itineraries for couples, families and solo travellers — designed around how you want to feel, not where the crowds go.

intro.heading: Every journey starts with a feeling
intro.p1: The world is vast, full of wonder. But information engulfs us — see this, do that, don’t miss this. It seems the more choice there is, the more overwhelmed we feel. And you’re never once asked the only question that matters: how do you want to feel?
intro.p2: That’s where we come in. bookit is a tailor-made travel studio in North Macedonia that designs fully personalised itineraries — not templates, not off-the-shelf tours. Whether you’re a couple seeking adventure, a family exploring together, or a solo traveller chasing something extraordinary, we craft every detail around you.
intro.p3: Since {year} we’ve planned journeys across the Balkans, the Mediterranean and beyond — trusted to get the details right, from the first idea to the moment you’re home. No planning fees, no crowds, no compromises.
intro.p4: So let’s begin. Let’s do something remarkable.

explore.title: Explore our trips
explore.subtitle: Remarkable journeys to inspire the mind.

destinations.title: Find your next horizon
destinations.intro: From the lakes and highlands of North Macedonia to the wider Balkans and Mediterranean — every journey planned from scratch around you.

trips.title: Journeys, start to finish
trips.intro: Complete itineraries we design and run end to end — every transfer, guide and long lunch arranged around you.
trips.empty: New itineraries are on the way. Tell us how you want to feel and we'll craft one.

browser.empty: No journeys match that feeling yet — tell us what you have in mind and we'll craft one.

regionPage.introBody: No two countries in {region} feel the same — and no two trips here should either. We design every journey around how you want to feel, from the first idea to the moment you're home. No templates, no planning fees.
regionPage.experienceSubtitle: Explore our {region} experiences based on how you want to feel and when you want to travel.

destinationPage.reassure: No planning fees · reply within 24 hours
destinationPage.tripsIntro: These sample itineraries are simply suggestions for the kind of holiday you might have. Yours will be tailored, altered, and refined until it matches you completely.

experiencesPage.title: Who's travelling?
experiencesPage.intro: Every journey is shaped around the people on it. Choose who you're travelling with — we design the rest around how you want to feel.
experiencesPage.tripsIntro: A few journeys to spark ideas — each tailored, altered and refined until it's yours.

footer.description: Tailor-made luxury travel from North Macedonia, designed entirely around how you want to feel. No templates. No planning fees.

enquiry.sentTitle: Your enquiry is on its way
enquiry.sentBody: We’ll match you with a bookit travel expert and be in touch within 24 hours to set up a time to talk — over email, phone or video, whatever suits you. In the meantime, you can reach us any time on <phone></phone>.
enquiry.title: Let’s plan something remarkable
enquiry.pageIntro: Send us the details below and we’ll be in touch shortly — pairing you with a bookit travel designer and arranging a time to talk, by email, phone or video. Prefer to speak now? Call us on <phone></phone>.
enquiry.whereLabel: Where would you like to go?
enquiry.whenLabel: When would you like to go?
enquiry.budgetLabel: How much would you like to spend, per person?
enquiry.commentsPlaceholder: e.g. a special occasion, any must-dos or must-avoids
enquiry.hearLabel: How did you hear about us?
enquiry.newsletter: Sign up for occasional travel inspiration from our team. No spam, unsubscribe any time.
enquiry.finePrint: No planning fees · no obligation · reply within 24 hours
enquiry.openNote: We’re here Monday to Friday, 9am–6pm CET.
